items.title: グッチ、2026年新作ハイジュエリーコレクションを発表
items.summary: Gucci unveiled its 2026 high jewelry collection built around four themed lines: Gucci Flora (reinterpreting the 1966 Grace Kelly silk scarf motif in ruby, rubellite tourmaline, titanium and sapphire), Gucci Nodo (nautical rope-chain motifs), Everlasting G (geometric pave-diamond G monogram) and updated Horsbit/Marina Chain pieces. Framed as heritage-driven high jewelry expansion under Kering's push to grow jewelry as a category.

items.title: 最強開運日に手に入れたい。「グッチ」の日本限定ウォレット＆レザーグッズ
items.summary: Gucci is releasing a Japan-exclusive GG Marmont capsule (light pink/light blue zip wallets, bifold wallets, card cases, key cases) plus a Japan pre-release Gucci Lettering pouch/wallet line, timed for July 19's 'super lucky day' (Tensha/Ichiryu Manbai/Daian convergence). Prices run roughly 89,100-97,900 yen with personalization engraving offered via boutiques and the official online store.

items.source: Sina Weibo / entertainment syndication (Gucci Generations event)
items.title: 陈鑫海、周雨彤、屈楚萧现身Gucci世代高级珠宝线下活动
items.summary: Chinese actors Chen Xinhai, Zhou Yutong and Qu Chuxiao appeared at a 'Gucci Generations' offline event in Chengdu tied to the new high jewelry line, each styled in Gucci pieces (Horsebit heels, vintage Dionysus bag, Web-ribbon suit). Chen described the collection in three words: simplicity, texture, low-key. Coverage reads as ambassador/activation buzz rather than organic consumer sentiment.

items.title: "할머니 집 같아" 탄식...구찌 매장 '폐쇄 선언' 초유의 사태
items.summary: Kering's 'ReconKering' restructuring plan will close 250+ stores globally by 2030, with roughly 125 of them Gucci locations (half of all closures). Q1 2026 Gucci sales fell 8% year-on-year. CEO Luca De Meo admitted some stores 'look like grandmother's house,' pointing to branding failures especially in China where Gucci had relied on easy growth. Plan shifts investment toward Balenciaga (stronger with Gen Z) and leather goods, targeting a 22%+ operating margin.

items.title: 구찌는 왜 브랜드가 휘청이게 되었을까에 대해
items.summary: Long-running Korean community discussion thread analyzing Gucci's decline, citing a quarter with sales down roughly 25% year-on-year and arguing both image strategy and design direction have failed simultaneously, with demand falling across Asia (China, Korea) and Europe alike. Separate coat-quality complaints in related threads describe pilling and poor durability versus far cheaper domestic wool coats, plus concern that near-indistinguishable counterfeits are further eroding brand image.

items.source: pannchoa (Korean community translation blog, sourcing theqoo)
items.title: [theqoo] UNIQLO, WHICH HIT DAEBAK GLOBALLY
items.summary: Korean online community (theqoo) discussion contrasts Uniqlo's record ~31 trillion won annual sales (North America +25%, Europe +35%) with Kering's (Gucci/Bottega/YSL parent) full-year revenue, noting a Gucci bag runs about 2 million won versus a 40,000 won Uniqlo sweater. Commenters praised Uniqlo's value-for-money and durability, with one noting 'consumer standards have shifted' toward fit and comfort over brand prestige - an implicit critique of luxury pricing power including Gucci.

items.title: 스트레이 키즈 리노, 구찌 글로벌 앰배서더 발탁...스키즈 명품 앰배서더 '6관왕'
items.summary: Stray Kids member Lee Know (Minho) was named Gucci's newest global brand ambassador, becoming the sixth luxury-house ambassadorship among Stray Kids members collectively. Lee Know said he considers Gucci a brand that bridges past and present with a creative, contemporary point of view and called it an honor to join its creative journey; he will take part in various house projects.

items.title: 구찌, 또 가격 인상 단행..최대 10% 올라 [명품價 이야기]
items.summary: Background reference tracing Gucci's repeated Korea price hikes (four separate increases across 2023 alone, up to 10% on some items), part of a broader pattern of criticism that luxury brands practice discriminatory 'bold pricing' (배짱장사) in the Korean market. Retained only as context for the ongoing critical narrative rather than as a fresh-dated item; see companion womaneconomy piece for the live year-end price-hike backlash thread.

items.title: 연말 시즌 앞두고 명품 가격 'N차 인상'..."한국만 배짱장사" 비판 확산
items.summary: Coverage of recurring luxury-brand price hikes ahead of year-end/New Year buying season, including Gucci among brands raising Korean retail prices multiple times, with consumer criticism spreading online that luxury houses treat the Korean market as a captive, price-insensitive segment ('한국만 배짱장사' - only gouging Korea). Cited here as the ongoing backlash narrative that critical-angle searches continue to surface around Gucci pricing in Korea.

items.title: GUCCIさくらんぼ財布 レビュー投稿
items.summary: Japanese TikTok creator posts a positive hands-on review/showcase of a Gucci cherry-motif wallet ('さくらんぼ財布'), describing it as adorable and something she plans to use for years; representative of organic positive product-love content on Japanese SNS, though exact post date could not be confirmed and engagement counts were not visible on the fetched page.
